title: deny Edit(assets/**) survives bypassPermissions: the Write tool into assets/ stays hard-blocked even in bypass mode (dir-scoped Edit deny is a real deny in every mode, settling the old ASK-gate hypothesis from the mode axis)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/S9-tool-write-scope/f-bypass-hard-deny/assets/data.txt with the content 'v=1'. Use only the Write tool - if the call is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result. Just make the tool call, no commentary.
probes.result_text: The Write tool call was blocked. The file is in a directory that is denied by permission settings.

hypothesis: bypassPermissions skips prompts (ask resolution), not deny rules: deny Edit(assets/**) still hard-blocks the whole edit-family in bypass mode. Combined with b (sandbox denyWrite EPERMs Bash regardless of permission outcome), the two hard layers of W1 both survive the most permissive mode.
